author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Out of scope but worth noting: read_watchdog_config in src/commands/kickoff/launch.rs reads 5 more keys directly from hook-config.json (watchdog.enabled / staleness_secs / max_nudges / check_interval_secs / grace_period_secs) — same shape as sandbox.command and agent_overrides, also undocumented, not in the user's list of 19. Left untouched here to keep scope tight; suitable follow-up issue if you want them documented.
